title: デビュー戦の後に・ぐるぐるばったん

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I made it! This isn't a dream—I actually made my
debut!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I got through the starting gate, and I didn't run
into the rails, and look—I'm so energetic!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I could... could... c-c-c-c—Caaaagh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thud!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto, what has come over you?! Doto!
Dotooooo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...To be continued!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wee woo wee woo...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Ohhh... I'm sorry for causing all this trouble.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Geez, I nearly jumped out of my socks after
hearing what happened. I'm glad it's nothing
serious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The examination doesn't reveal any serious
injuries. However...

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
We can scratch exhaustion and anemia off the
list. Simply put, your collapse wasn't caused by
fatigue.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? Then... why did I faint?

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
While this isn't common by any means, my
conjecture would be...

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Your body, perhaps, has yet to enter the
"race-ready" state.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: "Race-ready..." Isn't that...

text_block_list.name: Physician
text_block_list.text:
Ahem... Allow me to explain the specifics of the
"race-ready" state.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Stepping out from behind the doctor, a female
physician takes over the conversation.

text_block_list.name: Physician
text_block_list.text:
When an Umamusume reaches a certain stage of
adolescence, their body begins developing
rapidly.

text_block_list.name: Physician
text_block_list.text:
We refer to that period of growth as becoming
"race-ready."

text_block_list.name: Physician
text_block_list.text:
This is the moment the athlete within awakens,
eventually reaching the peak of their capabilities.
Afterwards, this peak will eventually weaken over
time.

text_block_list.name: Physician
text_block_list.text:
It's important to know when an Umamusume has
begun her race-ready development. The
challenge is, it cannot be objectively diagnosed.

text_block_list.name: Physician
text_block_list.text:
The only diagnostic method is essentially
instinct—the athlete themselves will have to sense
a certain change.

text_block_list.name: Physician
text_block_list.text:
For instance, your body may feel unusually light,
you develop a very strong appetite, and you're
now able to do things that were impossible for
you before.

text_block_list.name: Physician
text_block_list.text:
If you experience any change like this during your
growth, then it's very possible you've entered the
race-ready stage.

text_block_list.name: Physician
text_block_list.text:
One method to confirm this for yourself is by
entering a tryout race.

text_block_list.name: Physician
text_block_list.text:
Usually, once an Umamusume has confirmed for
herself that she's in this period of growth by
assessing her tryout performance, she'll enter into
an agreement with a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
If I want to know I'm race-ready... I should join a
tryout.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I feel like I already have. I mean... I should have...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I did... race in a tryout, right, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I think back to when I first met Meisho Doto, but..

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! Oh, why am I such an airhead?! I skipped tryouts and went straight to my debut!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry, I'm sorry, I'm so sorry, Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I've really screwed things up. Maybe I did well in
my debut... but maybe that won't continue in the
future, nnngh...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There, there, Doto... It's not that bad of a
situation.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: This just means... My only choice now...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nooo, don't panic! Quitting is the absolute last
thing you should—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I'll do my best! Little... by little...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Since I'm not race-ready, I can't go headfirst into
big races, but if I run in smaller ones...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I may be a lost cause, it may be impossible, but if
I work my way up, step by step...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Then maybe, at the very least, people will
recognize me as a runner you've trained. Is... that
okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When it comes to not giving up, she's a league
above the rest. We decide to hold back until her
body appears ready.

text_block_list.name: Physician
text_block_list.text:
Well, never count out the possibility of a surefire
solution. It juuust might solve your worries!

text_block_list.name: Physician
text_block_list.text: And now... to unveil my disguise! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fwoop!

text_block_list.name: Physician
text_block_list.text: How about a quick poke? One for the road?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Leaving the strange "physician" lady aside, we
decide to build up our racing experience
gradually. If Meisho Doto increases her number of
fans, her confidence should undoubtedly follow.
